name: Cooper Teboe
subject: A peek into our monthly bills
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[1]Ro Khanna

February is
already close to ending, which means our bills are almost due.

No one likes to talk about the bills, but it costs a lot to keep our
movement work going – especially since we’re funded by grassroots
supporters like yourself, instead of corporate PACs.

Since the COVID-19 pandemic began, we have had to start investing in more
digital tools to help our team stay connected, and to make sure Ro can
reach his constituents and supporters.

But these tools can get expensive. We’ve emailed you about why the work Ro
does in Congress is so important quite a bit this month, but we’re still
barely halfway to our monthly donation goal – and there are only 5 days
left in the month.

We need your help to push us over the finish line.

[ https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6058?refcode=ema-1653&t=1001&akid=1653%2E946728%2EwroogG ]Could
you please pitch in anything you can afford to help cover our monthly
costs? Every donation helps us keep using the latest technology to keep in
touch with supporters to make our movement stronger.

Our team pays at least $12,000 a month just to stay connected. Here’s a
rough breakdown of where some of those costs are coming from:

* The tool we use to send you important and helpful email updates:
$5,000
* The tool we use to collect donations from grassroots supporters like
you: $1,000
* The tool our field team uses to help turn out the vote every election:
$500
* The tool that helps Ro virtually connect with his constituents and
supporters: $250
* Other miscellaneous tools and programs we need to make all our
programs run smoothly: at least $5,250

We know, $12,000 may sound like a lot. But that’s where our grassroots
supporters come in.

[ https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6058?refcode=ema-1653&t=1021&akid=1653%2E946728%2EwroogG ]Can we count on you to chip in today to help cover the costs of our
movement building work? Our average donation is just $18.04.

[ https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6066?refcode=em-1653&t=1022&akid=1653%2E946728%2EwroogG ]Contribute $18.04

Thank you for your support,

Cooper Teboe

Ro for Congress

Contribute to Ro's campaign for re-election: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-khanna?refcode=em20210223footer&t=1023&refcode2=1653_946728_wroogG&akid=1653%2E946728%2EwroogG

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=1653%2E946728%2EwroogG

PAID FOR BY RO FOR CONGRESS
PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051

body:
Right now Pelosi, Biden, and all radical Democrats are trying to jam their agenda through Congress

Friend,
**Right now Pelosi, Biden, and all radical Democrats are trying to jam their agenda through Congress.** They are working fast to make it almost impossible for Republicans to take back the House in 2022. That's why we need to get to work NOW!__

[HELP TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cKBy8_s9ZVmPNxnhUGauqPgEP3C8R2jNHEHpqJPaa-mcmrQV9Jga_DBSSwiP2t1_hYy0ADO7-4MMqnYxu-MwlsYKsK26KpKnUHSOsdSGJoNQ8yjKOwmJY0jUFWVq3e6_V2C4SzYndArdSfUJLuMhcsR3GUd148srtqJU0L3BtM6P8A4H9RipyhUshMLAhpB1913URCnEgkAxqMr_uSz5gpV6K1Hm3mY0NOTg62CBgHmi949uTQ2ImEcT-4HSEThv-GQr38Rql6ya337UIcWDN7VUmrMgVPx-IUNC0OopIDOyhBV_bCtLXHIBU2eJHiapL3jQuSKh4l1xnNBefPNdCBUz9r8bxJIses-4VoHHLvWGZLu9BHHEgwu3K9WBtoujS7LvutzIYZsOZ5ZC7ewNiFf-GuSLMRA65jblAtysTFSz0ZjdAPtTqOLvonOjYBoh&c=5cDUPRkTEfQGfIFd82OgBHoroOsX304_gzVyx9vXgK_YFuzHFsUlFQ==&ch=AcNPvUEklqF04XPLlse59aB58xd6Vpnwan7d68UIo5k1pWqcsuLVnA==)

Democrats are doing everything they can to silence conservative voices. It is clear conservative policies work, but the Democrats don't want you to see that.

We cannot allow their radical agenda to continue. They have already cost hard-working Americans their livelihoods. We can't let them take away our voice as well.

[HELP TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cKBy8_s9ZVmPNxnhUGauqPgEP3C8R2jNHEHpqJPaa-mcmrQV9Jga_DBSSwiP2t1_hYy0ADO7-4MMqnYxu-MwlsYKsK26KpKnUHSOsdSGJoNQ8yjKOwmJY0jUFWVq3e6_V2C4SzYndArdSfUJLuMhcsR3GUd148srtqJU0L3BtM6P8A4H9RipyhUshMLAhpB1913URCnEgkAxqMr_uSz5gpV6K1Hm3mY0NOTg62CBgHmi949uTQ2ImEcT-4HSEThv-GQr38Rql6ya337UIcWDN7VUmrMgVPx-IUNC0OopIDOyhBV_bCtLXHIBU2eJHiapL3jQuSKh4l1xnNBefPNdCBUz9r8bxJIses-4VoHHLvWGZLu9BHHEgwu3K9WBtoujS7LvutzIYZsOZ5ZC7ewNiFf-GuSLMRA65jblAtysTFSz0ZjdAPtTqOLvonOjYBoh&c=5cDUPRkTEfQGfIFd82OgBHoroOsX304_gzVyx9vXgK_YFuzHFsUlFQ==&ch=AcNPvUEklqF04XPLlse59aB58xd6Vpnwan7d68UIo5k1pWqcsuLVnA==)
**
We have the chance to get our voice back in 2022 Friend.** We made huge gains in the House in 2020, now we need to finish the job. We are 8 seats away from restoring our voice in the House and putting a STOP to the radical liberal agenda. [**Can we count on your support today?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cKBy8_s9ZVmPNxnhUGauqPgEP3C8R2jNHEHpqJPaa-mcmrQV9Jga_DBSSwiP2t1_hYy0ADO7-4MMqnYxu-MwlsYKsK26KpKnUHSOsdSGJoNQ8yjKOwmJY0jUFWVq3e6_V2C4SzYndArdSfUJLuMhcsR3GUd148srtqJU0L3BtM6P8A4H9RipyhUshMLAhpB1913URCnEgkAxqMr_uSz5gpV6K1Hm3mY0NOTg62CBgHmi949uTQ2ImEcT-4HSEThv-GQr38Rql6ya337UIcWDN7VUmrMgVPx-IUNC0OopIDOyhBV_bCtLXHIBU2eJHiapL3jQuSKh4l1xnNBefPNdCBUz9r8bxJIses-4VoHHLvWGZLu9BHHEgwu3K9WBtoujS7LvutzIYZsOZ5ZC7ewNiFf-GuSLMRA65jblAtysTFSz0ZjdAPtTqOLvonOjYBoh&c=5cDUPRkTEfQGfIFd82OgBHoroOsX304_gzVyx9vXgK_YFuzHFsUlFQ==&ch=AcNPvUEklqF04XPLlse59aB58xd6Vpnwan7d68UIo5k1pWqcsuLVnA==)

Friend, Young Kim (R-CA) is a staunch supporter of small businesses in California and across America.
After many have been forced to close their doors due to the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic, she has made it her mission to help them get back on their feet. She's working to lower taxes, get small businesses the support they need, and cutting back red-tape that prevents businesses from thriving.
Supporting small businesses is a top priority for Young Kim, but she wants to know if her grassroots network feels the same way.
That's why we're reaching out to you requesting your participation in our 2021 Flash Poll.
[**How important is supporting small businesses in our community to you? clean_body: Supporting small businesses is a top priority for Young Kim, but she wants to know if her grassroots network feels the same way. == | 2021 FLASH POLL How important is supporting small businesses in our community to you? | == == == == == Friend, Young Kim (R-CA) is a staunch supporter of small businesses in California and across America. After many have been forced to close their doors due to the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic, she has made it her mission to help them get back on their feet. She's working to lower taxes, get small businesses the support they need, and cutting back red-tape that prevents businesses from thriving. Supporting small businesses is a top priority for Young Kim, but she wants to know if her grassroots network feels the same way. That's why we're reaching out to you requesting your participation in our 2021 Flash Poll. == * Please Note: This poll expires at midnight tonight. Responses submitted after the deadline will not be counted in our final tally. clean_body: We are so close to reaching our end of month goal to keep up with the Democrats' dark money. ** . == Friend, We are just four days away from our critical end of month fundraising goal. We are close to reaching this goal and keeping up with the Democrats' dark money, but right now, we are short of where we need to be... we need your help to cross the finish line. Team Steel is counting on support from patriots like you so we can stand up to the Democrats' radical agenda and achieve our goals. == | == == == Michelle is working hard to make sure our conservative views are heard in Washington. But she can't do that alone. The Democrats are working tirelessly to spend their dark money and make sure they flip this seat from red to blue. We cannot let that happen. Last time the Democrats spent $11 million to keep this seat. Now they're more determined than ever to flip it and push through their failed socialist policies. That's why Michelle needs your help to hold this seat and advocate for California small businesses and to keep taxes in check. == == ==** == Nancy Pelosi is ready to spend whatever it takes to stop us from finding common sense, conservative solutions that support small businesses. If we hit our February 2021 goal, we will tell her and the Democrat dark money that their socialist agenda has no place in California. == Thank you for your support, Team Steel HQ With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. Friend, allow me to introduce myself.

**I 'm Josh Mandel, and I'm running for U.S. Senate in Ohio. **

_Why am I fighting to go to Washington at a time like this, you ask?****_**Well, the short answer is I 'm fighting to defend the Constitution, and to stand up for the people of Ohio.**

The long answer is this: I'm fighting to break up the system. The system that -- _for far too long_ \-- has allowed for our individual liberties to be trampled on, the system that has shut down schools and small businesses, and the system that continually tries to destroy the tremendous progress made in America over the last four years.
**[JOIN THE FIGHT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l-QMA9dBCrkuHuOJdTkJabxhpmi90aKwtXtI6ZDF4q_B_YWPDlFIfQayB3Ty2o7S9jAViF2jHE0BHwxNMfYAwor2Ltagje3XVg8R_wswbRzISBB4DH_5OJiveU0U_BAQd5U3NahoJL0e4stnzHJMcaC07-RD60kUu0w3WIzX2JM1Yvui_-e1ZE8iydU3q9Snxgtlq-VaDR1hO7uC3lyMwCvMLO8RQcg5-_xx2fP0B6x4Ch8Fh-2jqXImNtmOUZpMy6HI_AZV6n3450gtKXH1X_1yVGEF9Bq-_rAJflo2N0_BIpDzUEXGhDOIeYJKEV5mc8ZDbUqpNjQkOly0B6-CY1NPDHKFFdiAZnGULArTQZ6mBIBDyNLsEPyo8x3_sQ1a2CjcCPKoNXZE2RlfnwybeRe3jbxp5x08pNJ47s8b8fcDgGlr0sGBRQ==&c=i-ajVRjRBLoFFReRGzmL3h1BKLqNiFUpI9Ty79AQ3Rpja7waTZXL_w==&ch=BEG_rSQ-zgJX6P-1igYuVAxhEvwX2ndZ_GNMXJlvohd0ZYb91vNRBQ==)**
It's clear that the big hand of government and its power-hungry politicians do not have your best interest in mind. They're far too concerned with their own power to consider what's best for our kids, for our families, or for American workers. That's precisely why I'm fighting to go to Washington: **to put power back into the hands of the American people and stand up for our personal freedoms and individual liberties. **
**[**JOIN THE FIGHT**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l-QMA9dBCrkuHuOJdTkJabxhpmi90aKwtXtI6ZDF4q_B_YWPDlFIfQayB3Ty2o7S9jAViF2jHE0BHwxNMfYAwor2Ltagje3XVg8R_wswbRzISBB4DH_5OJiveU0U_BAQd5U3NahoJL0e4stnzHJMcaC07-RD60kUu0w3WIzX2JM1Yvui_-e1ZE8iydU3q9Snxgtlq-VaDR1hO7uC3lyMwCvMLO8RQcg5-_xx2fP0B6x4Ch8Fh-2jqXImNtmOUZpMy6HI_AZV6n3450gtKXH1X_1yVGEF9Bq-_rAJflo2N0_BIpDzUEXGhDOIeYJKEV5mc8ZDbUqpNjQkOly0B6-CY1NPDHKFFdiAZnGULArTQZ6mBIBDyNLsEPyo8x3_sQ1a2CjcCPKoNXZE2RlfnwybeRe3jbxp5x08pNJ47s8b8fcDgGlr0sGBRQ==&c=i-ajVRjRBLoFFReRGzmL3h1BKLqNiFUpI9Ty79AQ3Rpja7waTZXL_w==&ch=BEG_rSQ-zgJX6P-1igYuVAxhEvwX2ndZ_GNMXJlvohd0ZYb91vNRBQ==)**
---

Thank you,

Josh Mandel
_Conservative for U.S. Senate (R-OH)
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l-QMA9dBCrkuHuOJdTkJabxhpmi90aKwtXtI6ZDF4q_B_YWPDlFIfQayB3Ty2o7S9jAViF2jHE0BHwxNMfYAwor2Ltagje3XVg8R_wswbRzISBB4DH_5OJiveU0U_BAQd5U3NahoJL0e4stnzHJMcaC07-RD60kUu0w3WIzX2JM1Yvui_-e1ZE8iydU3q9Snxgtlq-VaDR1hO7uC3lyMwCvMLO8RQcg5-_xx2fP0B6x4Ch8Fh-2jqXImNtmOUZpMy6HI_AZV6n3450gtKXH1X_1yVGEF9Bq-_rAJflo2N0_BIpDzUEXGhDOIeYJKEV5mc8ZDbUqpNjQkOly0B6-CY1NPDHKFFdiAZnGULArTQZ6mBIBDyNLsEPyo8x3_sQ1a2CjcCPKoNXZE2RlfnwybeRe3jbxp5x08pNJ47s8b8fcDgGlr0sGBRQ==&c=i-ajVRjRBLoFFReRGzmL3h1BKLqNiFUpI9Ty79AQ3Rpja7waTZXL_w==&ch=BEG_rSQ-zgJX6P-1igYuVAxhEvwX2ndZ_GNMXJlvohd0ZYb91vNRBQ==)_

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Take Action: Stop Biden’s Radicals and the sinister HR1
body:
| |
---
The House and Senate are back in session, and the 117th Congress has launched itself into overdrive. There’s a lot of activity going on on both sides of the Capitol dome, so this week, we need you to undertake actions in both the House and the Senate.
|
---
**ACTION ITEMS**
**1\. Sign the petitions to your Senators against the nominations of[Bacerra for HHS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDU1LWFhMWI5YjRlNDI4NDRhOGU5YmZkNWM5ZjBkNjI4ZGM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9ja2JlY2VycmEuYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDM0MTYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=UdQ1ptrfwwsBgshU83qwDw) and [Tanden for OMD Director](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDU1LWFhMWI5YjRlNDI4NDRhOGU5YmZkNWM5ZjBkNjI4ZGM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9ja3RhbmRlbi5hY3QudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00MzQxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=spoy8ZqdCa69rRxQJcrhFw).**

[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDU1LWFhMWI5YjRlNDI4NDRhOGU5YmZkNWM5ZjBkNjI4ZGM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9ja2JlY2VycmEuYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDM0MTYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=35uN3NXjD8Whm6H2lA2_Tw)

[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDU1LWFhMWI5YjRlNDI4NDRhOGU5YmZkNWM5ZjBkNjI4ZGM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9ja3RhbmRlbi5hY3QudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00MzQxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=dm8B__TIa9bAMbE86Wc7Qg)

|
---
**2.[Call your Congressman or Congresswoman](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDU1LWFhMWI5YjRlNDI4NDRhOGU5YmZkNWM5ZjBkNjI4ZGM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG91c2UuZ292L3JlcHJlc2VudGF0aXZlcy9maW5kLXlvdXItcmVwcmVzZW50YXRpdmU_bWlkPTQzNDE2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=RwZa4uXPUmAw-9_p75GMkQ) and urge them to vote NO on H.R. 1.**
|
---
Call to Action Details

**First up, in the Senate, we want to focus on two nominations –[Xavier Becerra for Secretary of Health and Human Services](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDU1LWFhMWI5YjRlNDI4NDRhOGU5YmZkNWM5ZjBkNjI4ZGM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9ja2JlY2VycmEuYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDM0MTYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=y6iXqksdw9-T00xJ96ZRzw), and [Neera Tanden for Director of the Office of Management and Budget](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDU1LWFhMWI5YjRlNDI4NDRhOGU5YmZkNWM5ZjBkNjI4ZGM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9ja3RhbmRlbi5hY3QudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00MzQxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=g5F9Uz2Y0trzJW9pMHd3zA).** Neither one of them is well qualified for the position for which he or she has been nominated, and both of them, if confirmed, would work hard to implement radical left policies. Tanden’s nomination is already in trouble – Democrat Sen. Joe Manchin of West Virginia has already announced his opposition, and it does not look like any Republican senator is going to come to her rescue. Becerra’s nomination could be in trouble, too, especially if we raise the temperature in Senate offices. We’ve got petitions to the Senate for both of them, so if you could sign the petitions and then [call your two senators](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDU1LWFhMWI5YjRlNDI4NDRhOGU5YmZkNWM5ZjBkNjI4ZGM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9nZW5lcmFsL2NvbnRhY3RfaW5mb3JtYXRpb24vc2VuYXRvcnNfY2ZtLmNmbT9taWQ9NDM0MTYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=4eVLMQN18Vl3gNVeSXG4cw) and urge them to vote against Becerra for HHS Secretary and Tanden for OMB Director, we’d by very appreciative.

**Second, in the House, Speaker Pelosi has been pushing a terrible bill – H.R. 1, the poorly-named “For the People” Act.** It really ought to be called the “For the Politicians” Act, instead. This bill will essentially federalize elections, overturning more than two centuries’ worth of American tradition that says the state and local governments run elections. If this bill passes, it will be virtually impossible to verify that voters are who they say they are, and it will be almost impossible to know if votes being counted are legal and legitimate votes. Moreover, other aspects of the 800-page bill will make it more difficult for groups like ours – composed of like-minded citizens, like you – to operate. Not only that, but (like an awful lot of legislation written in Washington) the bill is an incumbent-protection scheme – it offers candidates who have might fear the task of fundraising an enticing six-to-one match on contributions up to $200, but then severely limits the amount of money they can raise from any one individual donor (from $5,600 down to just $1,000), so the net result is to keep challenger candidates underfunded, and, therefore, less threatening. [So please call your Congressman or Congresswoman](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDU1LWFhMWI5YjRlNDI4NDRhOGU5YmZkNWM5ZjBkNjI4ZGM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG91c2UuZ292L3JlcHJlc2VudGF0aXZlcy9maW5kLXlvdXItcmVwcmVzZW50YXRpdmU_bWlkPTQzNDE2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Ry7KkTGBZIauzuYsta4AfA) and urge them to vote NO on H.R. 1.
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDU1LWFhMWI5YjRlNDI4NDRhOGU5YmZkNWM5ZjBkNjI4ZGM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDM0MTYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Tht8rnp5ZmYq6BspPDwjVA)
|

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Vaccination Information:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

It’s almost been a whole year since we first started adjusting our lives in order to stop the spread of COVID-19. While there is a light at the end of the tunnel, we still have a lot of work ahead of us in Congress to expand access to the vaccine.
| If you or any of your loved ones are seeking access to the COVID-19 Vaccine, please find more information about who qualifies, how to register, and more below:

— **California residents who may qualify for the vaccine are as follows:** Healthcare workers, Long-term care residents, anyone who is 65 and older, anyone who works in agriculture and the food industry, anyone who works in education and childcare, and anyone who works in emergency services.

Doc asked me to follow up on his email. Thousands of our supporters have taken this ONE-QUESTION poll on Joe Biden, but your results are missing.

You’re one of our top supporters, so we want to make sure you don’t miss this opportunity.

_Doc is taking on Joe Biden and the woke left every day — but he wants to know what YOU think._

[**Do you approve of Joe Biden? Take this poll and let us know.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=66a2066f21&e=0b94e583bc)

Brent Robertson

From: Senator Roger Marshall
---

| | Joe Biden has been in office for a month and he’s done nothing but make the woke left happy.

He’s ended the Keystone XL pipeline and killed thousands of blue-collar jobs. He’s threatening our farmers and ranchers with ridiculous new regulations. He’s trying to destroy women’s sports by letting biological boys play them.

**And now he’s announced a plan to rip away guns from law-abiding gun owners.**

**I think it’s ridiculous — and I’m standing up to Biden’s radical agenda every day in the U.S. Senate. But I want to know what YOU think — do you approve of Joe Biden? **
[**Take the ONE-QUESTION POLL and let me know!**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=5882a1e390&e=0b94e583bc)

---
| Biden promised unity, but he’s already proven that was a sham.

He thinks our schools should stay closed — even though the science says otherwise.

He thinks our tax dollars should fund abortions around the world.

**This isn’t unity and Joe Biden is no moderate. I’m committed to taking on his radical agenda in the U.S. Senate — but I want to know what my top supporters think. **

[**Do YOU approve of Joe Biden? Take the ONE-QUESTION poll and let me know!**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=12d17bfb0e&e=0b94e583bc)

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.**

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Have you gotten a chance to lend a hand to people in Texas yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
I know we reached out to you yesterday, but I personally wanted to ask you to join me in giving what you can to the great people of Texas in their current time of need. Many people are still without power, warm shelter, and other basic necessities. On top of that, the weather has disrupted regional food supply chains, meaning many Texans are also running out of food.

**That 's where we can help out.**

[**Can I count on you to chip in what you can to Feeding Texas, which distributes food to folks on the ground who really need it?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fhf1FNLskXiLB7Zlf4qq29dG6qkmsxu0TWD1_YxGaDk=/J4OZzvi9lV5y8mwQALSN3FU-8lCKXyy1oEJT6lqVJB8=?refcode=X_022321_TXRelief_B)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/fhf1FNLskXiLB7Zlf4qq29dG6qkmsxu0TWD1_YxGaDk=/J4OZzvi9lV5y8mwQALSN3FU-8lCKXyy1oEJT6lqVJB8=?refcode=X_022321_TXRelief_B)

Anything you can spare makes a huge difference, and together we can make sure that we keep our fellow Americans safe and well. I hope I can count on you to [**make a donation today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fhf1FNLskXiLB7Zlf4qq29dG6qkmsxu0TWD1_YxGaDk=/J4OZzvi9lV5y8mwQALSN3FU-8lCKXyy1oEJT6lqVJB8=?refcode=X_022321_TXRelief_B)

Thank you for your support,
\-- _Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

name: Moms for Higher Heights
subject: Help us support Black women in politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moms in Office
body:
Moms in Office is supporting Higher Heights
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25458542/273928226/-1388539918?refcode=0224&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1MjZkY2I0LWZiNzYtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=58PbsAuvNbZJznqshsoJYqjXRHDhfz3r9JcEL5XiKm4=)
Peter,
Moms in Office is committed to making sure our government is representative and works for all families. Part of what we do is uplift other groups working towards the same goals.
Higher Heights of America is working to uplift Black women in politics, from organizing to running for office. We stand with them in that endeavor. We are proud to have endorsed some of the same women as them, including Nikema Williams, Candace Valenzuela, and Adrienne Bell.
[Join us in uplifting Black women](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25458543/273928227/-1388539918?refcode=0224&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1MjZkY2I0LWZiNzYtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=58PbsAuvNbZJznqshsoJYqjXRHDhfz3r9JcEL5XiKm4=)
We owe Democratic control of the Senate to the work of Black women organizing and running for office. We hope you'll join us in supporting Higher Heights to continue that work in future cycles.
Thanks for all you do,
Simona Grace

Part of what we do is uplift other groups working towards the same goals. Higher Heights of America is working to uplift Black women in politics, from organizing to running for office. We stand with them in that endeavor. We are proud to have endorsed some of the same women as them, including Nikema Williams, Candace Valenzuela, and Adrienne Bell. = We owe Democratic control of the Senate to the work of Black women organizing and running for office. We hope you'll join us in supporting Higher Heights to continue that work in future cycles. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20AOC?=
subject: Feeding Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Friend, Texas is witnessing the consequences of our rapidly changing climate.
In Houston, Texans lined up to fill buckets of water from an outdoor spigot. Why? Because more than 8.8 million people are still without water or are under boil water notices.
That's why this weekend we asked Team AOC to pitch in to support thirteen organizations providing direct relief throughout the state -- and you came through! **Together we raised over $5 million for direct relief in Texas so far!**
But our work isn't done yet. And, that's why today we're coming to you with another ask:
[**Millions of Texans -- many of whom are unhoused -- are struggling to find their next meal or to put food on the table for their families. Can you make a $6 contribution right now to support local food banks and direct relief organizations working to feed Texas?**](https://middleseat.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c349e75ff61299f2517ccd6a4&id=bd4ab27542&e=56d97305b4)
**[Contribute $6](https://middleseat.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c349e75ff61299f2517ccd6a4&id=ece96ebc56&e=56d97305b4)**
_100% of your donation will go directly to these organizations._
**North Texas Food Bank, Food Bank of the Rio Grande Valley, Central Texas Food Bank** , and others are all working around the clock to provide food and resources to vulnerable Texans. But, they need our help to keep up with demand.
Texans have been left to deal with the devastating consequences of an unchecked climate crisis -- due to a lack of preparedness and failed state leadership, and a lack of investment in clean energy infrastructure.
While pipes burst and gas power plants continue to fail, hot showers and hot meals have become a luxury for millions of families in Texas. We must do everything we can to help people now.
[**Friend, will you make a contribution right now of whatever you can afford to these local food banks and organizations working across Texas to provide direct relief and help feed our communities?**](https://middleseat.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c349e75ff61299f2517ccd6a4&id=aaca096d90&e=56d97305b4)
Thank you for stepping up today,
Team AOC
---
[](https://middleseat.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c349e75ff61299f2517ccd6a4&id=cdb232f871&e=56d97305b4) | [](https://middleseat.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c349e75ff61299f2517ccd6a4&id=432448caef&e=56d97305b4) | [](https://middleseat.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c349e75ff61299f2517ccd6a4&id=0417f099df&e=56d97305b4)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://middleseat.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c349e75ff61299f2517ccd6a4&id=0d6ddc5e09&e=56d97305b4). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://middleseat.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c349e75ff61299f2517ccd6a4&id=c07063cf8c&e=56d97305b4)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://middleseat.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c349e75ff61299f2517ccd6a4&id=3e808219f5&e=56d97305b4&c=8e7fc83aec). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Stacey Abrams Update
subject: Congratulate Stacey Abrams on her Nobel Peace Prize nomination→
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY 314 ACTION FUND, 314ACTION
body:
Stacey Abrams was just nominated for the Nobel Peace Prize in recognition for her tireless work defending and expanding civil rights in Georgia and across the country.
You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously expressed interest or taken part in our efforts. If you'd rather not get all of our updates you can [click here](https://action.314actionfund.org/go/4?t=4&akid=997%2E3423351%2E6WL4p6) for only the most important emails.

To unsubscribe instantly [you can click here.](https://action.314actionfund.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=997%2E3423351%2E6WL4p6)
| BREAKING: Stacey Abrams nominated for Nobel Peace Prize!

[Congratulate Stacey on her historic nomination and recognition of her tireless efforts to expand access to the right to vote→](https://action.314actionfund.org/signup/congrats-staceyabrams/?source=314_EM_PT_210209_1DNTL_none_STD_2_staceyabrams&t=7&utm_medium=ActionKit&utm_source=email&akid=997%2E3423351%2E6WL4p6)

Let’s get 10,000 people to sign her card TONIGHT!

[](https://action.314actionfund.org/signup/congrats-staceyabrams/?source=314_EM_PT_210209_1DNTL_none_STD_2_staceyabrams&t=8&utm_medium=ActionKit&utm_source=email&akid=997%2E3423351%2E6WL4p6)

**The right to vote is sacred and fundamental to our democracy:**

Stacey Abrams has worked tirelessly to make that right more accessible for millions and combatted racist voting laws pushed by the GOP in the South.

_Equality and justice for all requires equal access to the ballot box:_ No one has done more to achieve that in this past decade than Stacey.

[Be one of 10,000 people to congratulate her on her historic Nobel Peace Prize nomination→](https://action.314actionfund.org/signup/congrats-staceyabrams/?source=314_EM_PT_210209_1DNTL_none_STD_2_staceyabrams&t=10&utm_medium=ActionKit&utm_source=email&akid=997%2E3423351%2E6WL4p6)

body:
New Dem Bill will DESTROY election integrity...
**"Overall the bill is designed to auto-enroll likely Democratic voters, enhance Democratic turnout, with no concern for ballot integrity."**
-WSJ Editorial Board, 1/24/21
Friend,
**Democrats ' "For the People Act" is anything but that -- more like For the Democrats Act.** This massive government takeover of elections will give elected officials UNPRECEDENTED control over how they are elected, and completely cement Democrats' political domination...
* Full statehood voting power for ultra-liberal D.C.
* Prohibit voter roll purges
* Automatic voter registration across the country
* Full voting rights for FELONS
* Full expansion of early and absentee voting by mail
* Cancel and silence conservative donors through FORCED donor disclosure**[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWIYtaVlNtAfYpBudsusN0p6pokLDKhIAsonOpo3AZ39RgHbxYqMbcsG0ZSa4ZEGZHEg6o80VcDNEj_A2LFwQKQWFdFhkNQgrP7Qoq3O4WISClvrn4L3nMP2sxeNeHeNDc7RbWEaU11qZ9JFJAfAU9Bb2S2jXvMtANwP3yPfQYBzoVAcZgVVn7upwrvk8viUvSKjzMw160avzBkbk83mE0KpYfRjDewdItfxdnUy1lN0sV907hov2Wz52YXCmR0XWyR91Q2n_g6C9gudleby4XfEQ2DWmRvlknGLATZf14phc2NgZ-3bpmEXUKcGFzxbq7hkwEL8yRRjE7TeNT8VzQAEIukccfG2enPA1M5Od4m1S507Cb3H8E5l83CcA6tP3-LQy-zFNmEjJfmosJi2G5USih0ZTCMec44M3MY_VA5NNkroVsxJVMBKU6fEB9T7xcgv4vm5j0o=&c=G-QuhmWJXNchJpwHdqOxv8ovyLiTsCj9CCFS0We06lTrynfuIGChhA==&ch=dT-XX6hR1My-qnjjokGefAOfB7ywhElPGHGMR40zJY-lOU71ER3L1g==)**

This is not right. Now is not the time to further undermine Americans' trust in our voting rights and processes.
**[**PROTECT MY VOTE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWIYtaVlNtAfYpBudsusN0p6pokLDKhIAsonOpo3AZ39RgHbxYqMbcsG0ZSa4ZEGZHEg6o80VcDNEj_A2LFwQKQWFdFhkNQgrP7Qoq3O4WISClvrn4L3nMP2sxeNeHeNDc7RbWEaU11qZ9JFJAfAU9Bb2S2jXvMtANwP3yPfQYBzoVAcZgVVn7upwrvk8viUvSKjzMw160avzBkbk83mE0KpYfRjDewdItfxdnUy1lN0sV907hov2Wz52YXCmR0XWyR91Q2n_g6C9gudleby4XfEQ2DWmRvlknGLATZf14phc2NgZ-3bpmEXUKcGFzxbq7hkwEL8yRRjE7TeNT8VzQAEIukccfG2enPA1M5Od4m1S507Cb3H8E5l83CcA6tP3-LQy-zFNmEjJfmosJi2G5USih0ZTCMec44M3MY_VA5NNkroVsxJVMBKU6fEB9T7xcgv4vm5j0o=&c=G-QuhmWJXNchJpwHdqOxv8ovyLiTsCj9CCFS0We06lTrynfuIGChhA==&ch=dT-XX6hR1My-qnjjokGefAOfB7ywhElPGHGMR40zJY-lOU71ER3L1g==)**
Last week, RSLC announced our new commission to improve voting security and trust by making it harder to cheat. But we need YOUR help to make it happen.

The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. I'm working to defend the lives of the unborn... |

---
| | Friend,

My faith teaches me that God created each person for a purpose and a reason. **That is why I am, and always will be, 100% pro-life.**

[Will you help me defend the unborn today with a contribution of $10, $20 or $30?](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=ba44c18265&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---
| [Donate Here](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=b864099b8d&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Donate Here")
---
| Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and the radical left are pushing pro-abortion policies in D.C. – and I’m standing up to stop them at every turn.

They walked back President Trump’s policy that prevented taxpayer funded abortions around the world and they want to go even further.

I have signed multiple pieces of pro-life legislation, many letters fighting against taxpayer funded abortions, and I joined the pro-life caucus.

**In Congress I’m standing up every day to protect the unborn.** But, to defend our district and ensure Nancy Pelosi and her liberal allies become the minority in 2 years, I need your help.

[Will you stand up for innocent life today with a contribution of $5, $15, or $25?](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=976357ed6f&e=d48ad6f8f4)

---
| Thank you for all you do to protect life. You can trust that I will be working hard to defend the unborn every day in Congress.

\- Rep. Randy Feenstra
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Did You See the Fake End Walz' Powers Bill?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building_re&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Multiple Fake End Walz' Powers bills are making their way through the Minnesota House and Senate right now. The Republican and Democrat Establishment are doing what they do best - protecting government's power.** In fact, Monday on the House Floor, the Republican and Democrat Establishment openly discussed how they aren't serious about solving this problem. RINO lobbyist-legislator Kurt Daudt and Con Artist Gene Pelowski are working together to screw us! Now think about this, if the Fake End Powers bill passes the Special Committee tasked with "solving the Emergency Powers" problem, it then will go to the House floor for final passage. At that point, the Republican Senate would have to pass the same bill. But they'll likely amend it, which sends it back to the House. The far radical left in the House will amend it again and send it back to the Senate. And so on and so forth.
## **You get the picture?**
Let's imagine it miraculously passes the Minnesota House and Senate. If it has any teeth, which it clearly won't because its a Fake End Powers Bill, then Walz would never sign the bill and it will be months of wasted time and false hope. All courtesy of the Republican and Democrat establishment. Meanwhile, Rep Mortensen's clean End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution could pass today with a glaring statement:
## Stop Walz' Assault on our Small Business and Freedoms! No deals. No compromise.
The Republican and Democrat Establishment is so concerned about protecting vulnerable members like Rep Julie Sandstede, that they are selling out on the one thing you put them in office to do: reclaim their constitutional power of lawmaking. Governor Walz has been an absolute disaster for this state. He's shut down and forced small business to go under. He's quarantined healthy people in their homes. And he's forcing youth athletes to wear masks while playing sports. At the same time, [COVID numbers have plummeted](https://www.action4liberty.com/what_emergency_minnesota_covid_numbers_plummet?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building_re&n=2) and some medical experts believe our country will achieve herd immunity by April.
## What the hell does this guy still have Emergency Powers for???
I'll tell you one thing. The Republican Establishment is not fighting for YOU. But we certainly are. **We just hired more field staff and deployed them up north. In just the first two weeks of operations we've door knocked thousands of voters' homes in Julie Sandstede's district. To put that in perspective, Julie only won election last November by 30 votes. If she doesn't start voting the right way, her political future is over.** Now I'm sure the Democrat establishment is telling her to be a good little follower. "Stay with us, and you'll get re-elected". Well Julie, how did that work out for Brand, Persell, Poppe and Tabke? All four Democrats we targeted last year got booted out of office on election day! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/dfl_targets_go_down_on_tuesday?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building_re&n=3) The Republican and Democrat Establishment are going to start learning how we are different than any other group they've seen before. We simply WILL NOT quit. When they put up challenges, we DOUBLE DOWN and hit em where it hurts. **You and I know this mission is too important to allow failure. The radical left is hellbent on destroying our Republic and we simply won't let them succeed.** I can't tell you how much I **[appreciate the support](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building_re&n=4)** we've received over the past month. You have allowed us to hire **four new doorknockers**. That means we'll be moving into more districts, talking to more voters, putting more pressure on vulnerable Democrats. And the more we work to identify people in these districts that support Ending Walz' Emergency powers, the more raw political muster we have to drive things home when it counts. Did you know that for the last two weeks, not a single other Republican has signed on to Rep Erik Mortensen's Article of Impeachment against Walz? These weak kneed Republicans better get on board before we start knocking in their districts as well. For God's sake, even Democrats in New York are talking about removing Governor Andrew Cuomo for his handling of COVID in nursing homes. Guess what? [Tim Walz had the EXACT SAME policy here in Minnesota](https://www.action4liberty.com/the_nursing_home_scandals_of_governors_cuomo_walz?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building_re&n=5)! What we've found talking to voters in rural Minnesota is that they overwhelmingly support Ending Walz' Emergency Powers AND holding him accountable. Once this current "emergency" is over, we will make sure it NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN! Simply put, the Emergency Powers laws in this state must be abolished because they are clearly used by politicians to enact tyranny. We have a Freedom Crisis on our hands, and we will not allow this to happen again. **The good news is that things are working. Every week, you see Reps Sanstede and Lislegard squealing in committee meetings about how the emergency powers are an issue. Thanks to YOU, this program is working.** I promise to you that we will continue applying pressure to these vulnerable legislators and will grow the best field operations in this state. And along the way, we will improve voter data to set us up for electoral success in 2022. Help us get these stacks of new lit out to voters... [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building_re&n=6) **Can I count on you to help our team continue applying the pressure on these politicians. Please help us with a[donation of $100. If that's too much, $50 or $25 can go along way to supporting our field operations. Want to help even more, consider a one time donation of $500. We need you on board!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building_re&n=7)** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building_re&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building_re&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building_re&n=10), software for leaders.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name if you agree: Congress must raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
We're long past overdue for an increase in the federal minimum wage, and the pandemic has only accelerated the crisis. Add your name if you agree: Congress must raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852528c/45c30650/1c5366935/66eb19d5/828529753/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
It's been more than a decade since the federal minimum wage has increased, even when living costs have skyrocketed.

Now working families -- especially workers of color -- are battling a global pandemic with barely enough to get by.

**[We're long past overdue for an increase in the federal minimum wage, and the pandemic has only accelerated the crisis. Add your name if you agree: Congress must raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852528c/45c30650/1c5366935/66eb19d4/828529753/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVoxNVBfU0dOX01JTl9FXzIwMjEwMjI0X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-min-wage?source=EMZ15P_SGN_MIN_E_20210224_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

**Two-thirds of Americans support raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour. So why hasn't it budged?**

Well, follow the money.

Take Walmart and McDonald's -- these huge corporations are among the top employers of Medicaid and food stamp beneficiaries.

That means as their executives are making huge profits, those profits don't trickle down to the workers keeping those businesses running -- and the government is left to help workers stay afloat.

**It's corporate welfare.**

Raising the minimum wage would...
1. Increase income for about thirty million and lift nearly a million families out of poverty.
2. Help boost income for people of color, who make up a disproportionate share of low-wage earners.
3. Give workers more money in their pockets to put back into the economy -- lifting all boats.

Here's the bottom line: Big business is not hurting during this pandemic. They're doing just fine. Working families are on the brink -- and have been struggling long before the pandemic.

**We have a chance to include a minimum wage increase in a COVID relief package, which will help our country build back better, stronger, and more resilient. It's time to make it happen.**

**[Add your name if you agree: Congress must raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852528c/45c30650/1c5366935/66eb19d4/828529753/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVoxNVBfU0dOX01JTl9FXzIwMjEwMjI0X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-min-wage?source=EMZ15P_SGN_MIN_E_20210224_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852528c/45c30650/1c5366935/66eb19d4/828529753/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVoxNVBfU0dOX01JTl9FXzIwMjEwMjI0X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-min-wage?source=EMZ15P_SGN_MIN_E_20210224_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20IN=20GOP?=
subject: Gov. Holcomb's letter to Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
The Biden administration is pushing a radical agenda on Americans. Learn More >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470262?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=81bfabc079&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Governor Holcomb [_**joined 16 other Republican governors in signing a letter to President Biden regarding the radical left’s stance on oil and natural gas production in America**_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=68f2e2e34a&e=1acd9bb3d6).

The United States has some of the largest deposits of oil and natural gas in the world, and we worked hard under President Trump to ramp up oil and natural gas production, creating thousands of well-paying jobs in the process and finally becoming an energy exporter.

Plus, the price at the pump remained low.

Now, the Biden Administration unilaterally signed an executive order banning new oil and gas development on federal land and in offshore waters.

---
| [DON’T LET DEMOCRATS DESTROY ENERGY PRODUCTION](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1d0ea07c00&e=1acd9bb3d6 "DON’T LET DEMOCRATS DESTROY ENERGY PRODUCTION")
---
| This action, without the consent of Congress or debate, has the potential to set off a catastrophic chain reaction for our country.

For one, thousands of hard-working Americans will lose their jobs at a time when they need them most. As effects of the COVID pandemic begin to subside, this will greatly hamper the ability for families to recover from the massive economic hardships imposed upon them.

It also leaves our country’s energy grid vulnerable to outside influence, posing a security risk for all Americans. For the first time in decades, America was exporting more than we were importing, decreasing our dependency on foreign countries and adverse actors.

With the global instability we’re currently experiencing, this leaves the door open to soaring energy prices – and will skyrocket the cost to fill up your gas tank.

It seems the Biden Administration is set on tearing down all of our energy sector’s gains in favor of their far-fetched “Green New Deal”. [_**Will you stand with us right now and contribute so we can fight back, and demand better energy policies coming out of the White House?**_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8c51c85418&e=1acd9bb3d6)

\- Team Indiana GOP
---

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Fw: 2/25 Event Invitation: Join Sen. Warnock, Rep. Sherrill, Rep. Lamb, & Sec. Murphy for a Salute to Service with Taking the Hill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,
I just wanted to make sure you saw this message from our Executive Director, Roger Misso, to join us Thursday evening (2/25). We are bringing together the incredible Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock, Rep. Mikie Sherrill, and Rep. Conor Lamb to talk about running and winning as veterans and military family members - and how we keep those victories going in 2021 and 2022.
[_**I 'm sending along the link for our special friends and family tickets - we're selling them until our Zoom room fills up, so get yours now! Click this link.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/sTwUFBFMWMu7R6VezMwTbE8tZI0oSj03fYVOM03MPFU=/Gdj19DDKRfd76HrEO4-ytQgIXGjjr0cM768_8JrfNL4=)
See you soon!
In solidarity,
Patrick

Hon. Patrick Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Fmr US House Rep (PA-01)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Roger Misso** <[roger@takingthehillpac.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/sTwUFBFMWMu7R6VezMwTbE8tZI0oSj03fYVOM03MPFU=/rfwp8EPWW1HpgLB1iHW9APXQqubJfXw-Sl6jkxhQyHc=)>
Date: Mon, Feb 22, 2021 at 5:21 PM
Subject: Fw: 2/25 Event Invitation: Join Sen. Warnock, Rep. Sherrill, Rep. Lamb, & Sec. Murphy for a Salute to Service with Taking the Hill
To: Peter Willis <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

Peter,

The veterans of Taking the Hill are proud to announce our first event of 2021: a _**[Salute to Service](https://act.myngp.com/el/sTwUFBFMWMu7R6VezMwTbE8tZI0oSj03fYVOM03MPFU=/Gdj19DDKRfd76HrEO4-ytQgIXGjjr0cM768_8JrfNL4=)**_ celebrating our 12 incredible victories in the US House and Senate last year!

We are honored to be joined by three outstanding guests: Sen. **Raphael Warnock** (D-GA), Rep. **Mikie Sherrill** (NJ-11), and Rep. **Conor Lamb** (PA-17). Our founder, 32nd Under Secretary of the Army and former Rep. **Patrick J. Murphy** , will also be with us to usher in a new year of victories for veterans and military families!

Our work to hold the House and expand our majority in the US Senate is already beginning. In order to succeed, we need to raise as much as we can for this event. [_**Will you purchase a ticket to help us guarantee veterans and military family members on the ballot win and bring integrity back to government? Click here to help us raise at least $10,000 to meet our goals!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/sTwUFBFMWMu7R6VezMwTbE8tZI0oSj03fYVOM03MPFU=/Gdj19DDKRfd76HrEO4-ytQgIXGjjr0cM768_8JrfNL4=)

[**Date: Thursday, February 25th
Time: 7:00 pm - 8:00 pm
Location: Zoom!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sTwUFBFMWMu7R6VezMwTbE8tZI0oSj03fYVOM03MPFU=/Gdj19DDKRfd76HrEO4-ytQgIXGjjr0cM768_8JrfNL4=)

We can't wait to see you next week!

In solidarity,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/sTwUFBFMWMu7R6VezMwTbE8tZI0oSj03fYVOM03MPFU=/vGcZ_UKCk6wCixshWN2rospUwnq4hZ9FO5ARpYr_IJs=)
[@RogerMisso](https://act.myngp.com/el/sTwUFBFMWMu7R6VezMwTbE8tZI0oSj03fYVOM03MPFU=/l4PZPUVv4o0WlkyRyw6SCLxfRnXyqmiQ4WrwkBwhdnY=)

Paid for by Taking the Hill
---
Taking the Hill
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States

[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa362/34a064cc/1daf8dc5/702674a/3515106150/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
February 24, 2021 ** **BREAKING: Georgia Bills HB 531 and SB 421 Moving Through Legislature Some of Worst Bills Since Jim Crow** ATLANTA -- Today, Georgia Republicans once again showed their contempt for voters as two of the worst voter suppression bills since Reconstruction continued to move quickly through the state legislature: SB 241 and HB 531. SB 241 would end no-excuse mail voting, implement new ID requirements, and add witness requirements for mail voters- in essence, creating one of the most restrictive absentee voting laws in the entire country and resulting in some of the worst voter suppression since Jim Crow. Meanwhile, HB 531 was also rushed out of committee today in a desperate attempt to force the legislation onto the floor before Crossover Day. The bill would restrict dropbox access, add new ID requirements for mail voting, and restrict weekend voting among other provisions, all of which demonstrate just how unrelenting the GOP-led Georgia legislature is in their attacks on voting rights. Not only are these ID and witness restrictions suppressive and unnecessary, but they are also outwardly discriminatory, and would have a disparate impact on Black and other minority voters across our state, as well as older voters and voters in single-person households. These proposals would erect a juggernaut of barricades to voting access, reviving Georgia's dark history of voter suppression and racism as state policy. **" Once again, GOP legislators in Georgia today showed the clear and urgent need for federal action to safeguard voting rights and pass HR 1 and HR 4 to protect voters from racist and malicious voter suppression," **said Fair Fight CEO Lauren Groh-Wargo. **" SB 241 and HB 531 are two of the most restrictive absentee voting policies in the country. These bills are nothing less than a direct attack on voting rights in GA, framed by far-right conspiracies and disinformation that undermines our democracy and takes voting rights in Georgia back to the days of Jim Crow."** SB 241 and HB 531 are assaults on democracy that constitute some of the worst attacks on voting rights since Reconstruction. Their progress today again shows just how critical it is that Congress pass HR 1 and HR 4 to protect voters and safeguard our democracy. ### |
---|---|---
